How It Works

1

Challenge Announced

We announce a surprise challenge via push notification and on this page. Challenges can be anything: 100 burpees, 5k run, 500 calories burned, etc.

2

Complete First

Use The Tracker App to log your completion. Your data is verified through our SMS, iMessage, or Telegram tracking, plus wearable integrations.

3

Claim Prize

First verified completion wins! Prize money is sent directly to your linked payment account within 24 hours.

Recent Winners

Loading recent winners...

Competition Rules

  • Must have an active Tracker App account with verified tracking method
  • Completion must be logged through official tracking channels (SMS, iMessage, Telegram, or synced wearable)
  • One entry per challenge per user
  • Ties decided by timestamp of completion submission
  • Prizes paid via PayPal, Venmo, or bank transfer within 24 hours
  • Staff and family members of The Tracker App are not eligible
